backendReadiness.graphics: package-visible Linux Vulkan ICD validation plus offscreen compute/readback proof

validationRecipes.name: environment-platform-linux-vulkan-package
validationRecipes.evidence: Installed linux_vulkan_runtime_probe emits linux_vulkan_runtime_probe_ready=1, linux_vulkan_runtime_readback_ready=1, linux_vulkan_runtime_probe_surface_family=offscreen_compute, first_party_linux_runtime_host_ready=1, native_handle_access=0, and no Windows or Android Vulkan inference before tools/validate-linux-vulkan-runtime-host.ps1 can promote environment_platform_linux_vulkan_ready=1.
